message:
fix(state): handle NULL columns in SQL queries with COALESCE

All nullable TEXT and INTEGER columns in state store queries now use
COALESCE to convert NULL to empty string or 0, preventing scan errors
when columns contain NULL values.

Affected tables: sessions, agents, tasks, reservations, approvals,
tool_health, context_packs, event_log.
